ab: Ci Asing ko ngangan no wama ako.
Ci Ipay ko ngangan no wina ako.
Moetep ko mihecaan no mako anini a mihecaan.
Cecayay ko kaka ako, ci Kolas cira, moerep ira ko cecay ko mihecaan nira anini a miheccaan.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Kolas，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is kolas, he is 11 years old.

ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: Maolahay kako ato kaka a miraradiw.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: Maolahay kako a midangoy, ano pahanhan i, mapolongay ko loma’ay niyam a midangoy.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: Maolahay kako a misawidang, nga’ay a malacafay kami a miraradiw ato midangoy.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
